title: Yemen’s Fragile Peace in Peril as Houthis Accuse Saudi Arabia of Bombing
summary_full: The Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen accused Saudi Arabia of striking Yemen’s main international airport in a dispute over an Iranian plane that tried to land in the capital, Sana.
summary_public: The Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen accused Saudi Arabia of striking Yemen’s main international airport in a dispute over an Iranian plane that tried to land in the capital, Sana.

SA.label: negative
SA.evidence: Saudi Arabia of striking Yemen’s main international airport
